reference: RAISING THE WOUNDED MAN WITH EASE THE BLACK KNIGHT RUSHED WITH HIM TO THE POSTERN GATE AND HAVING THERE DELIVERED HIS BURDEN TO THE CARE OF TWO YEOMEN HE AGAIN ENTERED THE CASTLE TO ASSIST IN THE RESCUE OF THE OTHER PRISONERS
text: Raising the wounded man with ease, the Black Knight rushed with him to the postern gate; and having there delivered his burden to the care of two yeomen, he again entered the castle to assist in the rescue of the other prisoners.
